title: Update dawidd6/action-send-mail action to v18
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [dawidd6/action-send-mail](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail) | action | major | `v17` → `v18` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>dawidd6/action-send-mail (dawidd6/action-send-mail)</summary>

### [`v18`](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/releases/tag/v18)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/compare/v17...v18)

#### What's Changed

- build(deps): bump brace-expansion from 5.0.5 to 5.0.6 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​291](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/291)
- build(deps): bump nodemailer from 8.0.7 to 8.0.8 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​292](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/292)
- build(deps): bump nodemailer from 8.0.8 to 8.0.9 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​293](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/293)
- build(deps): bump nodemailer from 8.0.9 to 8.0.10 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​294](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/294)
- build(deps): bump nodemailer from 8.0.10 to 8.0.11 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​295](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/295)
- build(deps): bump nodemailer from 8.0.11 to 9.0.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​296](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/296)
- node\_modules: update by [@​dawidd6](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6) in [#​297](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/297)
- build(deps): bump nodemailer from 9.0.0 to 9.0.1 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​299](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/299)
- build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 6 to 7 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​300](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/300)
- fix: Use extended HELLO with github.com domain by [@​kroese](https://redirect.github.com/kroese) in [#​302](https://redirect.github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/pull/302)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/dawidd6/action-send-mail/compare/v17...v18>

</details>
